apprunner.service.imageconfiguration.Por.Docs: The port that your application listens to in the container.  Default: `8080`

apprunner.service.imageconfiguration.Run.Docs: Environment variables that are available to your running App Runner service. An array of key-value pairs. Keys with a prefix of `AWSAPPRUNNER` are reserved for system use and aren't valid.

apprunner.service.imageconfiguration.Sta.Docs: An optional command that App Runner runs to start the application in the source image. If specified, this command overrides the Docker image’s default start command.
